summary: Hourly Billing Feature (Iteration 92) - Backend 10/10 tests passed, Frontend all flows verified. Toggle buttons, hourly/parties fields, cart display, history badges, and admin modal all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test bons created with TEST_HOURLY_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hourly billing feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: JeuxBonItem model extended with billing_mode ('parties' default, 'hourly'), hours, hourly_rate fields. POST /api/jeux/bons saves these fields correctly. GET /api/jeux/bons returns billing_mode/hours/hourly_rate in items. Frontend: CoachJeuxPage has toggle buttons 'Par parties' (toggle-mode-parties) and 'Forfait horaire' (toggle-mode-hourly). Hourly mode shows hours input (default 1), hourly_rate input (default 12000), and real-time forfait total calculation. Cart displays 'Forfait Xh' badge with hourly rate for hourly items, 'xN' badge for parties items. History tab shows correct badges. Admin JeuxBonsModal displays 'Forfait Xh @ Y F/h' for hourly items.
